system.damage: rusty sword d8+2 (_close_, _forceful_) or crushing grip d8+2 (_hand_, _grabby_, _forceful_)
system.moves:
- Utter an echoing warning
- Block an exit
- Stand fast, refusing to be moved
- Keep fighting with or reattach a severed limb

As you might expect, grave robbing was always a problem for the Barrow Builders. But a clever sorcerer had a solution! So many hateful spirits roamed the world in those days. Why not bind some to the corpses of the deceased, and let the dead guard their own treasure?
